Autumn Martin Humbaugh

ospnrtSdeoeh8lalPb 3c05M3aa 2iurhl 0gi58a103hF5f1tt8gr l:1ty5  ·
This is for parents that will have a child entering 6th grade at some point in the future. I currently teach 6th grade math and I cannot stress enough that as your child prepares to enter 6th grade, one of the most important ways you can support them is by helping them master their multiplication and division facts. We use these two skills in almost everything we do… decimals, fractions, ratios, percentages, equations, area, volume, e…
